Video.summary: Steve helps a pregnant prostitute change her lifestyle.
Video.title: Update: Steve & The Pregnant Hooker

Video.summary: Morgan literally dumps his fiancé at the altar for his secret lover, Victor! Next, John is leaving his fiancé, Jamie, now that his ex-wife wants him back! Later Dave is furious with his niece because she is engaged to a man of a different race.
Video.title: Outrageous Wedding Confessions

Video.summary: Our cameras were at home with sisters Olivia and Catherine when Olivia confronted her older sister for sleeping with her boyfriend, Jacob. Next Jeromy has been having an affair with 2 sisters and both are now pregnant!
Video.title: Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man

Image.alt: Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man
Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man
Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man

Video.summary: Santa and his elves to answer 7 very special Christmas letters from needy children. Watch these happy faces!
Video.title: Dear Santa…

Video.summary: Bobbie wants to end an online affair with a woman named Encore; Andrew's tiny mistake may end his relationship; Brieanna may have contributed to her boyfriend's affair with her co-worker.
Video.title: Sexperiments Backfire

Video.summary: Kitten wants to tell her mother that she is a prostitute because her mother was neglectful and drove her to it. These two women face off over the lies. Next ... Even though Skat's ex-girlfriend is married, he believes he can win her back!
Video.title: Heartbreaking Secrets

Video.summary: Glenda has been hiding two secrets from her boyfriend: She's secretly been seeing her ex and she wants to be a stripper! Then Veronica broke up with Roland when she caught him cheating. Now she's dating one of his friends and Roland wants her back.
Video.title: Secrets Come Out

Video.summary: Marco wants out of the marriage, and his affair with Chanel may be his perfect ticket out! Then Courtney's been Danny's perfect angel, but that hasn't kept him from longing for something more freaky, which he's found with the local stripper!
Video.title: My Man Slept With A Stripper!

Image.alt: My Man Slept With A Stripper!
My Man Slept With A Stripper!
My Man Slept With A Stripper!

Video.summary: Darryl has been cheating on his girlfriend Nicole with her hair dresser Nickell. He says he was just getting bored of the same old thing. Then Cheree is here because her girlfriend Chocolate is having a hard time coming out lo her family.
Video.title: Break-ups and Beatdowns

Video.summary: Nick's girlfriend finds out why he spends so much time with their neighbor; Osha's boyfriend scored with his female friend; Brandi resents her boyfriend's reckless behavior after all of the sacrifices she has made to keep their relationship.
Video.title: Clingy Chicks

Video.summary: Jen is going to tell John that she is dumping him for her secret lover, 73 year old Jerry. Next Danika has a little surprise for her fiancé which she feels compelled to tell him that she's really a man.
Video.title: Bizarre Love Affairs

Video.summary: A woman is ready to give up nine years of marriage; a woman confronts her husband and his Internet lover.
Video.title: 7 Kids, a Trucker & Waffles

Video.summary: A man impregnates his girlfriend's cousin.
Video.title: Steve & A Pregnant Girl

Video.summary: When John was sent away to prison, he asked brother Derrick to help take care of his family, but he never imagined Derrick would hook up with his baby mama! Then, John's tired of being Crystal's meal ticket and taking care of her family.
Video.title: Both Brothers Wanna Marry Me

Video.summary: Scotty says he feels like his girlfriend has a GPS on him 24/7; Giovanni blames his girlfriend for his infidelity; Winona wants to spice things up in the bedroom.
Video.title: Mistresses Reeled In

Video.summary: A woman thinks her friend is sleeping with someone she is also dating; a man wants his girlfriend back after she leaves; a woman tries to save her friend from what she thinks is a bad relationship.
Video.title: Boyfriend Stealing Bestie

Video.summary: Chris is here today to tell his girlfriend, Chrissy, about his sexual fetish. Next we meet Mistress Tara, the dominatrix who caters to Chris' fantasy. We'll watch him pretend to be a dog.
Video.title: My Day As A Dog!

Video.summary: Briget wants the rumors about her boyfriend's cheating to stop; Samantha says her best friend has turned into her worst enemy; Moniqua wants to get her ex-boyfriend's new baby-mama out of the picture.
Video.title: Fight Fest

Video.summary: A woman wants the truth from her sister and boyfriend; a woman must decide between two men; a woman hooks up with her friend's boyfriend.
Video.title: My Stripper Sister Strikes Again

Video.summary: Paige admits to sleeping with her friend's boyfriend; Alex confesses to cheating with two women; Kaylynn decides to get even with her friend.
Video.title: I Slept With 120 Men ... and Yours

Image.alt: I Slept With 120 Men ... and Yours
I Slept With 120 Men ... and Yours
I Slept With 120 Men ... and Yours

Video.summary: Alley and Jessica have a threesome with Nneka’s man Matt. Now Nneka’s here to get her revenge. Then, Jordan reveals to his girlfriend Cassandra that he may not be all the man she thinks he is. Plus more stories of relationships gone wild.
Video.title: Threesomes With My Sister

Video.summary: A woman sleeps with her brother; a woman leaves her controlling husband; a woman sleeps with her husband's sister; a man impregnates his mistress.
Video.title: My Brother Is My Lover

Video.summary: These guests say they are here to get naked and reveal their taboo sex fetishes. What could go wrong?
Video.title: Sexy Fetishes

Video.summary: Diamynn admits to hooking up with a man who has a girlfriend and a child; Angel regrets kissing Brittany and does not want to rekindle a relationship with her; Kaitlyn says her husband's floundering wrestling career is hard on their family.
Video.title: Baby, I'm Weak

Video.summary: A 17-year-old and her mother are prostitutes.
Video.title: Steve Confronts a 17-Year-Old Prostitute

Video.summary: Sony wants to know if Mobetta has been unfaithful.
Video.title: Rappers Battle... For Love

Video.summary: TiTi made a big mistake when she hooked up with her cousin's man Damo. Then, Ryan and Kristy are engaged, but Ryan says he wants to stop their upcoming nuptials because he slept with Kristy's sister Kayla.
Video.title: Men Show No Mercy

Video.summary: Nikki, Courtney, and Samantha all want to have a three-way lesbian marriage! Then Jonathan's engaged to two different women, but after they learn they're both being playing, he's going to have to make a choice.
Video.title: Brawlin' Brides!

Video.summary: Tony is sleeping with his girlfriends best friend, Allen. Next Tammy’s fiancée, Ron, has no idea that she's been sleeping with her best friend, Autumn. Later Jan’s lovers, Russ and Ian, find out that Jan has yet another romantic interest in her life.
Video.title: I'm Having A Bi-Sexual Affair

Video.summary: Michael is here to reveal to his girl Tiffany that he may have gone a little too far with her sister when he let her practice her stripper moves on him. Now he's worried sick that Tiffany will never forgive him.
Video.title: Sister Seduction

Video.summary: Keema wants to propose to the father of her child; Eleni went through her boyfriend's cell phone and found revealing text messages from another woman; Mike wants to keep his family intact, but his baby's mother has a confession to make.
Video.title: Young Mom Meltdown

Video.summary: Zack and Cheyenne have differing hopes for their future; Nee Nee confronts the friend she thinks is trying to sabotage her relationship with her boyfriend; Stormi confesses to sleeping with her friend's man.
Video.title: Driven to Cheat

Video.summary: Johnny's family hates his wife and his sister is here today to destroy his marriage. But, Johnny's wife isn't going quietly! Next Mitchell is here to confront his boyfriend about his boyfriend's decision to become a woman!
Video.title: The Springer Showdown
